name: @tallyman/openclaw-gmail
description: Access email inboxes through the Tallyman API — list, search, send, reply, forward, and manage messages, threads, drafts, labels, and attachments.

apiKey.description: Tallyman API key (tk_*). Falls back to TALLYMAN_API_KEY env var.

baseUrl.description: Tallyman API base URL. Falls back to TALLYMAN_BASE_URL env var, then https://api.tallyman.io.
